title: Im really the only one who felt attracted to Gendo
display_title: Im really the only one who felt attracted to Gendo
wikitext:
[]: I'm really the only one who felt attracted to Gendo             Quote Post by Letiarisol99 » Sat Oct 10, 2015 7:07 pm Maybe I'll say it sounds strange and maybe someone made a joke of myself... But since the first time I saw the series I felt attracted by Gendo Ikari,yes.. consider him a hot and attractive!!!!! (regardless of all the actions that he takes place in the whole series). Im the only women who like him in this forum??... Ciaoo

[]:             Quote Post by TheAdmiral » Sat Oct 10, 2015 8:35 pm What has been seen... SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Im the really one who...             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Oct 11, 2015 2:54 am Letiarisol99 wrote: I felt attracted by Gendo Ikari,yes.. consider him a hot and attractive!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Oct 11, 2015 9:45 am Well, uhm, i am not a woman so i can't say if he is attractive but what i can say is that he is a nice looking man in general so i guess many women would find him attractive (although Kaji should have more fans than Gendo). Also, fun fact but every time i re-watch the series i find Ritsuko more and more attractive. Probably nobody remembers it but i called her one of my least liked characters in Eva. Now i could say the opposite. Wonder why.....

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Oct 11, 2015 12:39 pm Gendo is a tall, dark, intelligent, mysterious, driven, extremely influential man who worked his way to success from nothing, is motivated by a tragic past relationship and is emotionally distant because he's afraid to be hurt like that again. To some ladies that shit is catnip, a tradition stretching from Wuthering Heights to 50 Shades of Grey. He's basically a romance novel waiting to happen of the bad boy fixer-upper sort. Edit: derail pruned.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Sun Oct 11, 2015 4:41 pm Let's be frank: Gendo is an asshole, but he's an asshole with a core of humanity and a lot of suffering. When you dig into him, you see that he's not that different from Shinji, save in the directions he took his life. And Yui obviously saw something in him. There is nothing wrong with finding Gendo a handsome fellow.

[]:             Quote Post by Letiarisol99 » Sun Oct 11, 2015 6:15 pm Well to respond to some users: when I see him, I forget all the things that he made: it's just physical attraction, and I feel personally, perhaps easier attracted to bad boys/men, I'm not the kind of girl that he likes the cute and cuddly guys... they make me boring. the only thing bad a/o negative thing I can say about Gendo in general is he is truly one of those people in his life was a scrub/hooligan dude,and suddenly he becomes someone higher than other people and think he knows everything in the world just because the ambition/hungry for power.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Sun Oct 11, 2015 6:41 pm ^ He's not ugly; he is a handsome guy.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo's New Groove » Mon Oct 26, 2015 8:25 pm I'm almost afraid to say it but... I kinda agree.

[]:             Quote Post by Letiarisol99 » Mon Oct 26, 2015 10:29 pm Gendo's New Groove wrote: I'm almost afraid to say it but... I kinda agree.
